title: Climate change and health - Canada.ca
content:
## Climate change and health
Health risks of climate change, who is most at risk, what we can do to reduce the impacts of climate change

### Who is most impacted by climate change
Who is at higher risk of the impacts of climate change and why

### Protecting your health from climate change impacts
How individuals, communities and health systems can adapt to reduce the impacts of climate change
Tips to protect yourself and your loved ones from the health impacts of extreme heat

### Infectious diseases and climate change
Risks from climate-driven infectious  diseases and how we're  taking actions to reduce health effects

### Climate change and travel health
How climate change can impact your health and safety when travelling abroad

## Health sector professionals
